TO CONFIRM SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH ROBERT WARFIELD, CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2005, GRANTED SUBJECT TO WRITTEN ORDER , APPROVED AS TO FORM. MR. MAH TO FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE. MR. BOESSENECKER REQUESTED FOR A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW HIS ACCOUNTANT TO REVIEW THE ACCOUTNING. THE CO-TRUSTEES STIPULATED TO PAY MR. SOJA'S SHARE OF THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT IN THE SUM OF $2,699.00 THEREFORE MR. BOESSENECKER WITHDREW HIS REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE ON THE CONDITION THAT HIS CLIENT WON'T BE CHARGED FROM THE SETTLEMENT. THE CO-TRUSTEE DANIEL LYNCH WANTS THE COURT TO APPROVE THE ACCOUNTING AND THE TRUSTEE'S REPORT. THE ACCOUNTING AND THE REPORT IS NOT PROPERLY BEFORE THE COURT AND THE COURT EXPLAINED TO MR. LYNCH HOW AN ACCOUNTING COMES BEFORE THE COURT. COURT IS APPORVING THE SETTLEMENT. THE ACCOUNTING AND THE REPORT ARE NOT APPROVED. THE BENEFICIARIES ARE NOT PROHIBITED FROM CHALLENGING THE ACCOUNTING AND THE TRUSTEE'S REPORT. THE ACCOUTING AND THE REPORT WERE FILED BUT NOT CONSIDERED IN THE PROCEEDINGS TODAY
